website.title: Paintless Dent Repair Services | Car Dent Removal Company
website.description: Paintless dent repair services from 【Dented】 that fixes ✔car hail damage, ✔door dings & ✔other vehicle dents. ➦ Our company provides auto dent removal services.

workflowSignals: Booking link exists; map whether booked appointments sync with follow-up reminders.
Quote-oriented CTA creates a natural conversation around lead qualification and quote follow-up.
